So the key points here are that she received her bachelor's degree with honors, while managing two jobs and being a wife and mother. The next part mentions her parents and son being in the audience at Ashland University when she received her diploma. She was excited about starting her teaching career and contributing to her family's well-being. Looking at the options: A. she became a good wife and got two jobs. - The passage mentions she was a wife and had two jobs, but the main point of the happy time is receiving her degree.
